columns.extraction_plan: Extract the percentage and confidence interval from Table 2, under the "Progression-free survival" row, in the "SOC + AAP" column, for the metric "% event-free at 5 years (95% CI)". Also, extract the Hazard Ratio (HR) and its 95% Confidence Interval (CI) for the comparison of SOC + AAP vs SOC-alone from the same table and row.

Extract the percentage and confidence interval from Table 2, under the "Progression-free survival" row, in the "SOC-alone" column, for the metric "% event-free at 5 years (95% CI)". Also, note the Hazard Ratio (HR) and its 95% Confidence Interval (CI) for the comparison of SOC + AAP vs SOC-alone from the same table and row, as it represents the comparative effect relevant to this arm.
